title: The Bakery Modpack
description: A builder-focused modpack for The Bakery, incorperating popular building mods and texture packs.
body:
A modpack for [The Bakery](https://www.bakery.builders/), incorperating popular builder-focused mods. It will be updated regularly to ensure it works on the latest version of Minecraft that The Bakery supports. This modpack is not approved by or associated with Bakery Builders. Highlights of this project are:

- Axiom: A client-side world editing studio, supported by The Bakery
- Freecam: Press ``F4`` to temporarily inspect your build, detached from your player
- OrthoCam: Toggle orthographic view, great for viewing and presenting your builds
- Flashback: Record your progress in-game and replay or export it later
- WorldEdit and WorldEditCUI: Shows WorldEdit selections in-game (not supported yet)
- Various rendering optimization & improvement mods (Sodium, Iris Shaders, etc.)

> _If you want to suggest a mod/texture pack or give feedback, feel free to ping me (@phoenix3000) on the Bakery Builders Discord server, which is also linked in the project._
